description: Cold or warm outreach to generate new leads

strong_opening.description: Agent opens with energy, states their name and company clearly, and gives a compelling reason for the call within the first 15 seconds.

permission_to_continue.description: Agent asks if it's a good time before launching into the pitch.

value_proposition.description: Agent communicates a clear, specific benefit for the prospect — not generic claims.

qualification_questions.description: Agent asks at least 2 qualifying questions (timeline, motivation, current situation) before pitching.

handles_objections.description: Agent responds to objections with empathy first, then logic. Does not argue or capitulate immediately.

appointment_ask.description: Agent makes a clear, direct ask for the appointment — not a vague 'would you be interested?'

two_option_close.description: Agent offers two specific time options rather than an open-ended 'when are you free?'

next_steps_confirmed.description: Call ends with a confirmed next step — date, time, and follow-up method agreed upon.
